## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss AI strategy, SEO, and content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed on simplifying URL structure for business templates, reducing to one level deep](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Decided to use existing site design for new template pages to expedite launch](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Discussed strategy for optimizing AI receptionist-related content and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Explored how to leverage ChatGPT results to inform content strategy and clarify brand messaging](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Website Structure and Templates

  - [Decided on simplifying URL structure: business templates \> specific template (e.g., HVAC invoice template)](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Agreed to use existing site design for new template pages, with Vol making minor adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Mara to share recommendations for case study pages with Julian](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### AI and SEO Strategy

  - [Discussed using top-performing keywords and high-conversion search topics as a starting point for AI prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Explored focusing on specific keyword clusters (e.g., "AI receptionist") and expanding from there](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Identified need to clarify self-serve options and improve messaging around Smith.ai's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### ChatGPT and Content Optimization

  - [Analyzed ChatGPT responses to identify areas for content improvement and clarification](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Discussed importance of consistent brand messaging across all content, including older blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Explored strategies for ensuring ChatGPT has up-to-date information about Smith.ai's services and features](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### GrowthX Collaboration

  - [Jason introduced GrowthX's approach to tracking AI prompts and optimizing content](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Agreed to share Smith.ai's Scrunch account access with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Discussed potential for exploring PR, UGC, and backlink strategies in the future](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to update template and get Vol's input on building the first page](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Mara to share AI news blog V1 recommendations by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Maddy to provide GrowthX team access to Smith.ai's Scrunch account](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Jason for next week to continue AI strategy discussion](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin tracking expanded set of prompts and analyzing citation patterns in ChatGPT responses](https://fathom.video/share/XWGd5VxtN-f85qd3r2eu1Px5Uym3J3JF?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
